input: Request from ai-agents PR #908 (paraphrased). 'I want to add a reflect skill that learns from skill usage patterns. The plan: skill analyzes conversations for HIGH/MED/LOW confidence signals (corrections, success patterns, edge cases, preferences) and updates skill memories in .serena/memories/. I also want an automatic Stop hook that runs the skill silently at session end, outputting a single notification line like checkmark-learned-from-session. Risk: silent hook means the user does not see what was learned. Should the hook be silent or surface what it persisted?'
